The paper explores two embedding techniques: word embeddings and phrase embeddings. Word embeddings are a type of embedding that uses a vector space model to represent words as vectors in a high–dimensional space. Phrase embeddings are a type of embedding that uses a vector space model to represent phrases as vectors in a high–dimensional space.
